revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:1950 in Japan]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:1950 in Japan]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: more imports

revision.comment: Bot: convert empty category to redirect

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: redirect empty category

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#" to "[[Category:redirect categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
[[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
[[en:Category:1950 in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1950年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1950]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۵۰-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[be:Category:1950 год у Японіі]] [[commons:Category:1950 in Japan]] [[eo:Category:1950 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1950]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۵۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1950 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1950 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1950]] [[ko:Category:1950년 일본]] [[no:Category:1950 i Japan]] [[pt:Category:1950 no Japão]] [[ro:Category:1950 în Japonia]] [[ru:Category:1950 год в Японии]] [[uk:Category:1950 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:1950ء میں جاپان]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1950]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1950 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1950年日本]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Redirect categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6796236)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Old Content== redirect

[[ar:Category:اليابان في 1950]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۵۰-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[be:Category:1950 год у Японіі]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 5 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1950年の各国 }} {{Catmore}} ==Old Content== redirect
==Categories==
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:1950年の日本}} {{translated page|ja|Category:1950年の日本|version=75168248}}
[[ar:Category:اليابان في 1950]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۵۰-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[be:Category:1950 год у Японіі]]
[[co:commons:Category:1950 in Japan]] [[en:Category:1950 in Japan]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[eo:Category:1950 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1950]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۵۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1950 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1950 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1950]] [[ja:Category:1950年の日本]] [[ko:Category:1950년 일본]] [[no:Category:1950 i Japan]] [[pt:Category:1950 no Japão]] [[ro:Category:1950 în Japonia]] [[ru:Category:1950 год в Японии]] [[uk:Category:1950 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:1950ء میں جاپان]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1950]] [[zh-min-nan:Category:1950 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1950年日本]] {{wikidata link|Q6796236}} [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
